recommendations.title: Mickey's Magical Christmas: Snowed in at the House of Mouse
recommendations.overview: When a huge snowstorm leaves everyone stranded, Mickey and all of his guests at the House of Mouse, including Pooh, Belle, Snow White, Cinderella, Ariel and many more of his old and new friends, break out the cookies and hot chocolate to help Donald
recommendations.director: Tony Craig, Burny Mattinson, Bobs Gannaway, Jack Hannah

recommendations.title: Stitch! The Movie
recommendations.overview: The continuing adventures of Lilo, a little Hawaiian girl, and Stitch, the galaxy's most-wanted extraterrestrial. Stitch, Pleakley, and Dr. Jumba are all part of the household now, but what Lilo and Stitch don't know is that Dr. Jumba brought his oth

recommendations.title: Leroy & Stitch
recommendations.overview: Lilo, Stitch, Jumba, and Pleakley have finally caught all of Jumba's genetic experiments and found the one true place where each of them belongs. Stitch, Jumba and Pleakley are offered positions in the Galactic Alliance, turning them down so they can

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Studio
recommendations.overview: Created for Disney's 100th anniversary, the short features Mickey Mouse corralling a gallery of legendary Disney characters for a group photo.

recommendations.title: Pluto's Christmas Tree
recommendations.overview: Pluto comes bounding outside to help Mickey get a Christmas tree. Chip 'n Dale see him and make fun of him, but the tree they take refuge in is the one Mickey chops down. They like the decorations, especially the candy canes and Mickey's bowl of mixe

recommendations.title: Trick or Treat
recommendations.overview: When the nephews come to Donald's house in their Halloween costumes he dumps water on them and laughs at his trick. A witch sees this and decides to help the kids. By magic she gives Donald a bad time and the kids finally get their treats.

recommendations.title: Brave Little Tailor
recommendations.overview: When a giant threatens the land, the cityfolk mistake Mickey's boast of killing seven flies with one blow to be giants. He is then forced to fight the giant for real.

recommendations.title: Lonesome Ghosts
recommendations.overview: On a dark and stormy night, four bored ghosts decide to have some fun by calling the Ajax Ghost Exterminators.

recommendations.title: The Big Bad Wolf
recommendations.overview: The Big Bad Wolf torments Little Red Riding Hood and the Three Little Pigs.

recommendations.title: Descendants 3
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Fantasy, Music
recommendations.overview: The teenagers of Disney's most infamous villains return to the Isle of the Lost to recruit a new batch of villainous offspring to join them at Auradon Prep.
